summary: Diagnosed and iterated on Phase 5 NVT energy injection. Root cause confirmed via OpenMM source: settle_velocities RATTLE implicitly encodes the dp momentum correction; adding explicit dp + SETTLE_vel double-counted it (T=5e48 K). Fixed: dp-only R-steps, no intermediate SETTLE_vel. Sprint formalized as PCW-33, campaign ef45b8b4, backlog #856-862, workflow script. Jobs 15367629 (oracle) and 15367630 (gate) running.
outcomes: OpenMM source confirmed: v += (x-x1)/(dt/n_R) is the missing momentum correction
Four failed Phase 5 attempts diagnosed: LFMiddle FALSIFIED, double-SETTLE stale-ref FAILED, double-SETTLE positions-mid FAILED, R-step with intermediate SETTLE_vel double-counted (T=5e48 K)
Sprint formalized: PCW-33, campaign ef45b8b4, backlog #856-862, workflow wf_f14f2ed8-d99
Bug fixes committed: intermediate SETTLE_vel removed, oracle sys.path patched
SLURM jobs 15367629 (oracle) and 15367630 (gate) submitted with corrected code
next_actions: If pass: run verify phase Workflow(resumeFromRunId=wf_f14f2ed8-d99, args={phase:verify, oracle_job:15367629, gate_job:15367630})
If gate fails: pull T trajectory from log, diagnose dp sign/magnitude
